changes.description: Baseline run with original SKILL.md (identical to verbose skill). Both tasks scored 60/100 — failing has-svg, bar-count, and has-path tests because the model used D3's dynamic DOM manipulation (d3.select().append()) which doesn't produce literal <svg>, <rect>, <path> tags in the HTML source.

Rewrote SKILL.md to use a server-side generation approach: instead of client-side D3 DOM manipulation, the skill now instructs the model to write a Bun generation script that reads CSV data, computes chart geometry (scales, positions, sizes), and writes a static HTML file with all SVG elements as literal markup. Provided complete bar chart and line chart generation script examples. Both tasks scored 100/100.
